name: FlightChess
short_description: 《FlightChess》is a game base on tradition game mode ludo to made,the name is it be called at China.Our game include classic mode and prop mode.You can play it with friends at host.And we will upload the online room soon.We hope you can play our game at weekend with your friends, enjoy the game.
detailed_description:
We are sorry to post a news

Unfortunately, we informed our players that our development team had already encountered force majeure and had been disbanded, unable to complete subsequent development, so we decided to take the game off the shelf within a few days.


About the Game

When it comes to flying chess, do you remember the fun times you had with your friends on the board? Now you can play online with your friends in the classic and soon the new prop mode! Flying Chess includes both classic and prop modes, and supports both single player AI and LAN multiplayer modes. The game has four different colored aircraft camps for players to choose from, easy to understand rules, simple and fast operation, and the exact same gameplay as you remember from your childhood, making it a great choice for many casual players! The early full version of the game is now available. Online play and prop mode will be released soon, so stay tuned!
